selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a clear understanding of the nature of this problem. Fake content can take many forms, including misinformation, disinformation, propaganda, and hate speech. It can be spread through various channels, such as bots, trolls, and manipulated media. To tackle this issue, it is necessary to adopt a multi-faceted approach that involves both technological and social solutions. On the technical side, AI-powered tools can be used to detect and flag fake content, while on the social side, education and awareness campaigns can help to empower users to make informed decisions about what they see and share online. Additionally, platform moderation and regulation can play a crucial role in preventing the spread of fake content. However, it is important to recognize that no single solution will be sufficient on its own, and a comprehensive approach that addresses the root causes of this problem is necessary."
